title: OpenQuant
description: Quantitative trading dashboard — signals, P&L, execution quality, regime analysis

list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM bars ORDER BY symbol
list.label: Symbol

list.name: chart_symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM bars ORDER BY symbol
list.label: Chart Symbol

list.name: Signals
list.rawQuery: SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, d.signal_side || ' ' || ROUND(d.signal_score, 2) || ' — ' || d.signal_reason as text, d.signal_side as tags FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id = b.id WHERE d.signal_fired = 1

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM bars
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM bars

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(d.signal_fired) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(d.signal_fired) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) as value FROM bars
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) as value FROM bars

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM trades t
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM trades t

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(AVG((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000), 2) as value FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(AVG((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000), 2) as value FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as value FROM trades
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as value FROM trades

options.content:
## Active Configuration

### Strategies
| Strategy | Enabled | Key Params |
|---|---|---|
| **Mean Reversion** | ✓ | buy z < **-2.2**, sell z > **1.8**, min vol **1.2×**, min score **0.5**, trend filter ON |
| **Momentum** | ✓ | ADX > **20**, min score **0.3**, +DI > -DI filter ON, min vol **0.8×** |
| **VWAP Reversion** | ✓ | buy z < **-1.8**, sell z > **1.2**, min vol **1.0×**, skip first **30** bars |
| **Breakout** | ✗ | squeeze required, vol surge **1.2×**, trailing stop **3.0× ATR** |

### Combiner
Min net score: **0.2** · Min strategies: **1** · Min exit strategies: **1**
Weights: mean-rev **0.40** · momentum **0.35** · vwap **0.25** · breakout **0.0**
CUSUM gate: **OFF**

### Risk
Max position: **$10,000** · Max daily loss: **$500** · Bet sizing: **linear**
Min reward/cost: **3.0×** · Est. cost: **5 bps**

### Exits
Stop loss: **2.5× ATR** (dynamic) · Take profit: **disabled**
Max hold: **150 bars** (~2.5 hrs) · Min hold: **10 bars**

### Symbol Overrides
| Symbol | Override |
|---|---|
| CVX | buy z < -2.8, min vol 1.5× |
| INTC | buy z < -2.5, max hold 80 bars |
| JPM | min vol 1.5× |

### Data
Max bar age: **120s** (stale bars rejected)

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.open, b.high, b.low, b.close FROM bars b WHERE b.symbol = '${chart_symbol}' ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.open, b.high, b.low, b.close FROM bars b WHERE b.symbol = '${chart_symbol}' ORDER BY b.timestamp

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.volume FROM bars b WHERE b.symbol = '${chart_symbol}' ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.volume FROM bars b WHERE b.symbol = '${chart_symbol}' ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Strategy Performance

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY strategy ORDER BY (buys+sells) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY strategy ORDER BY (buys+sells) DESC

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as signals, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score, ROUND(AVG(d.risk_passed)*100, 1) as risk_pass_pct FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY strategy ORDER BY signals DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as signals, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score, ROUND(AVG(d.risk_passed)*100, 1) as risk_pass_pct FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY strategy ORDER BY signals DESC

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY b.symbol ORDER BY (buys+sells) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buys, SUM(CASE WHEN d.signal_side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sells FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY b.symbol ORDER BY (buys+sells) DESC

panels.title: Signal Score by Strategy Over Time
panels.description: Each dot is a fired signal, colored by strategy. Look for score clustering or drift.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, d.signal_score as score, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' ELSE 'other' END as strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, d.signal_score as score, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' ELSE 'other' END as strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Z-Score at Signal Time
panels.description: Shows the return z-score when each buy/sell signal fired. Buy threshold: -2.2 (red line). Sell threshold: 1.8 (green line).

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.return_z_score as "Z-Score", d.signal_side as side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.return_z_score as "Z-Score", d.signal_side as side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: ADX at Momentum Signal Time
panels.description: ADX when momentum signals fired. Min ADX threshold: 20 (red line). Signals below 20 shouldn't exist.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx as "ADX", d.signal_side as side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx as "ADX", d.signal_side as side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Relative Volume at Entry
panels.description: Volume confirmation at signal time. Mean-rev needs ≥1.2× (red line). Momentum needs ≥0.8× (orange line). Dots below threshold = filter bug.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.relative_volume as "Rel Volume", CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap' ELSE 'other' END as strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_side='buy' ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.relative_volume as "Rel Volume", CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap' ELSE 'other' END as strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_side='buy' ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Exit Reasons
panels.description: How positions are closed. stop loss = ATR-based (2.5×). max hold = 150 bar timeout. Strategy exits = normal signal reversal.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%stop loss%' THEN 'stop loss (2.5× ATR)' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%max hold%' THEN 'max hold (150 bars)' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%take profit%' THEN 'take profit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum sell%' THEN 'momentum exit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion sell%' THEN 'mean-rev exit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%sell%' THEN 'vwap exit' ELSE d.signal_reason END as reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_side='sell' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%stop loss%' THEN 'stop loss (2.5× ATR)' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%max hold%' THEN 'max hold (150 bars)' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%take profit%' THEN 'take profit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum sell%' THEN 'momentum exit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion sell%' THEN 'mean-rev exit' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%sell%' THEN 'vwap exit' ELSE d.signal_reason END as reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d WHERE d.signal_fired=1 AND d.signal_side='sell' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC

panels.description: How each strategy contributes to signal generation. Mean-reversion fires on z-score extremes, momentum on ADX/EMA crossovers, VWAP on price-to-VWAP deviation.

panels.title: Signal Quality

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT d.signal_score FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT d.signal_score FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, d.signal_score as "score" FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, d.signal_score as "score" FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(AVG(d.risk_passed)*100, 1) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT ROUND(AVG(d.risk_passed)*100, 1) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT d.risk_rejection, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.risk_passed=0 AND d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY d.risk_rejection ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT d.risk_rejection, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.risk_passed=0 AND d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY d.risk_rejection ORDER BY count DESC

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch') as time, b.symbol, d.signal_side as side, ROUND(d.signal_score, 3) as score, d.signal_reason as reason, CASE WHEN d.risk_passed THEN '✓' ELSE '✗' END as risk, d.qty_approved as qty, ROUND(b.close, 2) as price FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch') as time, b.symbol, d.signal_side as side, ROUND(d.signal_score, 3) as score, d.signal_reason as reason, CASE WHEN d.risk_passed THEN '✓' ELSE '✗' END as risk, d.qty_approved as qty, ROUND(b.close, 2) as price FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 ORDER BY b.timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Signal scoring health. Mean-rev score = 0.6×|z-threshold| + 0.4×(vol-1.0). Momentum = 0.5×adx + 0.3×ma_sep + 0.2×vol. Higher scores should correlate with better forward returns.

panels.title: P&L & Drawdown

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.fill_price as "Fill Price", b.close as "Bar Close" FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.fill_price as "Fill Price", b.close as "Bar Close" FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT f.symbol, COUNT(*) as fills, SUM(CASE WHEN f.side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as buys, SUM(CASE WHEN f.side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sells FROM fills f GROUP BY f.symbol ORDER BY fills DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT f.symbol, COUNT(*) as fills, SUM(CASE WHEN f.side='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as buys, SUM(CASE WHEN f.side='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sells FROM fills f GROUP BY f.symbol ORDER BY fills DESC

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch') as time, f.symbol, f.side, ROUND(f.fill_price, 2) as fill_price, ROUND(b.close, 2) as bar_close, ROUND(f.slippage * 10000, 2) as slippage_bps, f.qty FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch') as time, f.symbol, f.side, ROUND(f.fill_price, 2) as fill_price, ROUND(b.close, 2) as bar_close, ROUND(f.slippage * 10000, 2) as slippage_bps, f.qty FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp DESC

panels.description: Round-trip trade performance. Trades close via: strategy exit signal, stop loss (2.5× ATR), take profit, or max hold (150 bars). No trades = positions still open or no fills matched.

panels.title: Time-of-Day Analysis
Signal Heatmap: Hour × Strategy
panels.description: Signal count by hour and strategy — bright cells = active windows

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch')) AS INTEGER) AS hour, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY hour, strategy ORDER BY hour
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch')) AS INTEGER) AS hour, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY hour, strategy ORDER BY hour

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch')) AS INTEGER) AS hour, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', datetime(b.timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch')) AS INTEGER) AS hour, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.description: Signal timing patterns. US market hours: 13:30-20:00 UTC. Best alpha windows are typically first 30min and last 30min. VWAP skips first 30 bars (~30min) at session start.

panels.title: Regime Analysis
ADX Trend Strength
panels.description: Red zone (ADX<15): ranging — momentum fails here. Orange (15-25): weak trend. Green (25-40): trending — momentum sweet spot. Blue (>40): strong trend. Config: momentum min_adx=20.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, COUNT(*) as count FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id GROUP BY regime
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, COUNT(*) as count FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id GROUP BY regime

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY regime, strategy ORDER BY regime
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY regime, strategy ORDER BY regime

panels.title: Avg Signal Score by Regime
panels.description: Higher score in the right regime = strategies are well-calibrated. Low scores in ranging = momentum firing on noise. Low in trending = mean-rev fighting the trend.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' WHEN f.adx > 15 THEN 'weak' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-rev' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY regime, strategy ORDER BY regime
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT CASE WHEN f.adx > 40 THEN 'strong-trend' WHEN f.adx > 25 THEN 'trending' WHEN f.adx > 15 THEN 'weak' ELSE 'ranging' END AS regime, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' THEN 'mean-rev' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, ROUND(AVG(d.signal_score), 3) as avg_score, COUNT(*) as count FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id JOIN features f ON f.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1 GROUP BY regime, strategy ORDER BY regime

panels.title: Regime Timeline
panels.description: ADX colored by regime. Red shade (<15) = ranging — mean-rev territory. Green shade (25-40) = trending — momentum territory. Blue (>40) = strong trend. Orange (15-25) = ambiguous.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx as "ADX" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.adx as "ADX" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: ADX-based regime classification. Momentum needs ADX > 20 (trending). Mean-reversion works best in ranging (ADX < 15). If momentum fires in ranging or mean-rev in trending, the combiner should downweight.

panels.title: Indicators
Bollinger Bands

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.close as "Close", f.bollinger_upper as "Upper Band", f.bollinger_lower as "Lower Band", f.sma_20 as "SMA 20" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.close as "Close", f.bollinger_upper as "Upper Band", f.bollinger_lower as "Lower Band", f.sma_20 as "SMA 20" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: Price with Bollinger Bands (20-period, 2σ). Close below lower band = oversold (mean-rev buy zone). Above upper = overbought (mean-rev sell zone). Band width shows volatility compression/expansion.

panels.title: EMA Crossover

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.close as "Close", f.ema_fast as "EMA Fast", f.ema_slow as "EMA Slow" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, b.close as "Close", f.ema_fast as "EMA Fast", f.ema_slow as "EMA Slow" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: Fast EMA above slow = bullish (momentum buy). Below = bearish (momentum sell). Crossover points are where momentum signals fire. Config: directional_filter=true requires +DI > -DI too.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.return_z_score as "Z-Score" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.return_z_score as "Z-Score" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Relative Volume

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.relative_volume as "Relative Volume" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.relative_volume as "Relative Volume" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: Red (<0.8×): too quiet — no strategy should trade. Orange (0.8-1.2×): momentum OK (min 0.8×), mean-rev won't fire. Green (1.2-2.0×): mean-rev confirmed (min 1.2×). Blue (>2.0×): unusual activity — high conviction.

panels.title: Bollinger %B
panels.description: Where price sits within Bollinger Bands. <0 = below lower band (oversold, mean-rev buy). >1 = above upper band (overbought, mean-rev sell). 0.5 = at SMA. Red zones = signal territory.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.bollinger_pct_b as "%B" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.bollinger_pct_b as "%B" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: +DI vs -DI (Directional Index)
panels.description: +DI > -DI = bullish pressure (green zone). -DI > +DI = bearish (red zone). Momentum config: directional_filter=true requires +DI > -DI for buys.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.plus_di as "+DI", f.minus_di as "-DI" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.plus_di as "+DI", f.minus_di as "-DI" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: Bollinger Bandwidth (Squeeze Detector)
panels.description: Low bandwidth = volatility squeeze (potential breakout). Breakout strategy (currently disabled) needs squeeze_required=true. Narrow bands → expansion often precedes big moves.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.bollinger_bandwidth as "Bandwidth" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.bollinger_bandwidth as "Bandwidth" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: ATR (Stop Loss Reference)
panels.description: Average True Range drives the dynamic stop loss (entry - 2.5× ATR). Higher ATR = wider stops = more room but more risk per trade.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.atr as "ATR", f.atr * 2.5 as "Stop Distance (2.5×)" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.atr as "ATR", f.atr * 2.5 as "Stop Distance (2.5×)" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.title: GARCH Vol vs ATR (Stop Loss Inputs)
panels.description: GJR-GARCH conditional volatility (converted to price-space: σ × close) compared against ATR. GARCH reacts faster to crashes due to the asymmetry coefficient γ.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.garch_vol * b.close as "GARCH Vol (σ×price)", f.atr as "ATR" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, f.garch_vol * b.close as "GARCH Vol (σ×price)", f.atr as "ATR" FROM features f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: Technical indicators driving signals. Bollinger bands (20-period SMA ± 2σ) drive mean-rev %B. EMA crossover (fast/slow) drives momentum. Z-score > ±2 = extreme. Relative volume > 1.2 required for mean-rev entry.

panels.title: Execution Quality
Slippage Distribution

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT (f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000 AS slippage_bps FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT (f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000 AS slippage_bps FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id

panels.description: Should be centered near 0. Config estimates 5 bps cost. If avg slippage >> 5 bps, the reward/cost ratio (min 3.0×) is miscalibrated.

panels.title: Slippage Over Time

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, (f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000 AS "Slippage (bps)" FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT b.timestamp/1000 as time, (f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000 AS "Slippage (bps)" FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id ORDER BY b.timestamp

panels.description: Look for degradation patterns. Slippage spikes during volatile periods or low liquidity. If trend is upward, execution quality is getting worse.

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT f.symbol, COUNT(*) as fills, ROUND(AVG((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000), 2) as avg_bps, ROUND(MAX(ABS((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000)), 2) as max_bps FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id GROUP BY f.symbol ORDER BY avg_bps DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT f.symbol, COUNT(*) as fills, ROUND(AVG((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000), 2) as avg_bps, ROUND(MAX(ABS((f.fill_price - b.close) / b.close * 10000)), 2) as max_bps FROM fills f JOIN bars b ON f.bar_id=b.id GROUP BY f.symbol ORDER BY avg_bps DESC

panels.description: Fill price vs bar close at signal time. Positive slippage = paid more than close (bad for buys). Target: < 5 bps avg. Est. cost in config: 5 bps. If actual slippage >> 5 bps, reward/cost ratio is wrong.

panels.title: Strategy Conflicts

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, d.signal_side, LAG(CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS prev_strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM sig WHERE strategy != prev_strategy AND prev_strategy IS NOT NULL
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, d.signal_side, LAG(CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS prev_strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM sig WHERE strategy != prev_strategy AND prev_strategy IS NOT NULL

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, d.signal_side, LAG(d.signal_side) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS prev_side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM sig WHERE signal_side != prev_side AND prev_side IS NOT NULL
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, d.signal_side, LAG(d.signal_side) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS prev_side FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM sig WHERE signal_side != prev_side AND prev_side IS NOT NULL

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1

targets.queryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, LAG(CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS from_strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT from_strategy as "From", strategy as "To", COUNT(*) as count FROM sig WHERE from_strategy IS NOT NULL AND strategy != from_strategy GROUP BY from_strategy, strategy ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000; WITH sig AS (SELECT b.symbol, b.timestamp, CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END AS strategy, LAG(CASE WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%momentum%' THEN 'momentum' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean-reversion%' OR d.signal_reason LIKE '%mean_reversion%' THEN 'mean-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%vwap%' THEN 'vwap-reversion' WHEN d.signal_reason LIKE '%breakout%' THEN 'breakout' ELSE 'other' END) OVER (PARTITION BY b.symbol ORDER BY b.timestamp) AS from_strategy FROM decisions d JOIN bars b ON d.bar_id=b.id WHERE d.signal_fired=1) SELECT from_strategy as "From", strategy as "To", COUNT(*) as count FROM sig WHERE from_strategy IS NOT NULL AND strategy != from_strategy GROUP BY from_strategy, strategy ORDER BY count DESC

panels.description: When strategies disagree or rapidly switch. High side-flip rate = whipsawing (buy then sell next bar). Combiner min_net_score=0.2 should filter weak consensus, but min_exit_strategies=1 allows fast exits.
